# omada_saml_idp (Resource)

Manages a SAML identity provider connection on the Omada Controller.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) The SAML Entity ID (Issuer) of the identity provider.
- `login_url` (String) The SAML Single Sign-On URL of the identity provider.
- `name` (String) The display name of the SAML IdP connection.
- `x509_certificate` (String, Sensitive) The X.509 signing certificate in PEM format. Automatically base64-encoded before sending to the API.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the SAML IdP connection.

### Read-Only

- `entity_url` (String) The SP Entity ID (computed by the controller).
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SAML IdP connection.
- `sign_on_url` (String) The SP Assertion Consumer Service URL (computed by the controller).
